prompt: Create a realistic full-body fashion portrait of a young adult Japanese office worker standing in a modern open-plan office, photographed from a very low floor-level angle with a slight wide-angle perspective so her legs appear long and the ceiling and desks recede dramatically behind her. She has dark brown hair styled in a soft messy updo with wispy bangs, a gentle friendly smile, natural makeup, and a delicate necklace. Outfit: a crisp white collared shirt under a light gray V-neck knit sweater, a black lanyard with a blue-and-white employee ID badge, a short white pleated skirt, sheer black tights, and glossy black high heels. Pose her standing confidently with one hand lightly touching the skirt hem and the other arm relaxed behind her, looking directly at the camera. The office background should include rows of desks, black swivel office chairs, white drawer units, large windows, fluorescent ceiling panels, and an air-conditioning vent, all softly blurred with shallow depth of field. Use photorealistic lighting, soft indoor daylight, subtle bokeh, high detail on the subject, natural skin texture, realistic fabric folds, and a clean corporate atmosphere. Vertical 2:3 composition, subject centered, full body visible from head to shoes, no extra people, no readable text except the indistinct ID badge.
